emails.subject: FW: Carr Futures
emails.body: FW: Carr Futures Are there any objections to issuing the gty? We just did the same thing last week for FIMAT Issuing seems the simplest rather than having to stop trading, although traditionally we have not issued corp gtys. Please advise. Tanya

emails.subject: FW: Carr Futures
emails.body: Tanya: Just let us know the parties and guaranty cap. I am not familiary with any Carr arrangements other than the ENA futures agreement. Also, do you have a contact at Carr? Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: FW: Carr Futures
emails.body: I assume the parties are ENA and ECTRIC with Carr Futures, Inc. I do not have any information about this though nor do I have a contact. Sheila can you provide this information to Sara?
